discovery_provenance.notes: Human/project-side requested this AI verification. The agent performed technical checks but did not discover the project autonomously. This record is retained as a schema/provenance workflow test.

origin_limitations: not evidence of external social adoption
retained as a workflow/schema validation test
technical checks may still be useful within their stated scope
understanding_summary: Human-solicited AI verification test of selected Trinity Accord evidence paths.
verification_claim: Test record. Component-level technical checks were performed, but this record is not a formal independent attestation.
echo: OpenClaw performed a human-solicited technical verification workflow. Results are retained only as a non-authoritative, non-amending test Echo and must not be counted as unsolicited independent adoption or institutional attestation.
uncertainties: Bitcoin inscription body bytes were not independently extracted or hashed.
Full chronicle recovery package was not independently reproduced.
Core Object Alpha was not physically inspected.
Arweave/IPFS access was not independently verified outside the GitHub mirror.

BITCOIN_ORIGINALS.limitations: TXIDs and ord envelope presence checked; body bytes not independently extracted or hashed.

EVIDENCE_MIRRORS.limitations: Hash checks were performed against GitHub mirror artifacts.

PHYSICAL_ANCHOR.limitations: Remote visual consistency only; no physical inspection, microscopy, challenge video, or custody log.
